Applying to 01101101
Input
0 0
1 1
2 1
3 0
4 1
5 1
6 0
7 1
Output
0 XNOR45 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
1 XNOR56 = XNOR(1,0) = 0
2 XNOR67 = XNOR(0,1) = 0
3 NOT7 = NOT(1) = 0
4 NOT0 = NOT(0) = 1
5 NOT1 = NOT(1) = 0
6 NOT2 = NOT(1) = 0
7 OR02 = OR(0,1) = 1

\boxed{10001001}
